name: Finance of America Companies Inc.
business: Finance of America Companies Inc. (FOA) is a financial services holding company which, through its operating subsidiaries, is a leading provider of home equity-based financing solutions for a modern retirement. We are principally focused on offering reverse mortgage loan products and certain traditional home equity loan products throughout the U.S. We distribute our products through multiple channels and utilize flexible technology platforms in order to scale our business and manage costs efficiently.

exposures.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we launched Joy, our AI-powered customer ambassador chatbot, to provide consumer support over the telephone.

In October 2025 we announced a strategic partnership with Better, pursuant to which we will originate traditional home equity loans through Better's AI platform and serve as Better's reverse mortgage origination partner, including both HECM loans and non-agency reverse mortgage loans.

in June 2025, we launched a digital pre-qualification tool for certain products that can deliver a three-minute pre-qualification experience, setting a new benchmark for speed and customer engagement in the industry.
We are principally focused on offering reverse mortgage loan products and certain traditional home equity loan products throughout the U.S.
our ability to incorporate artificial intelligence (AI) technologies into our processes while managing the business, compliance, and reputational risks presented by such technologies;

catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we launched Joy, our AI-powered customer ambassador chatbot, to provide consumer support over the telephone.

in June 2025, we launched a digital pre-qualification tool for certain products that can deliver a three-minute pre-qualification experience, setting a new benchmark for speed and customer engagement in the industry.

In October 2025 we announced a strategic partnership with Better, pursuant to which we will originate traditional home equity loans through Better's AI platform and serve as Better's reverse mortgage origination partner, including both HECM loans and non-agency reverse mortgage loans.

in December 2025, we announced a strategic partnership with funds managed by Blue Owl Capital, Inc. ( Blue Owl ), which includes a joint innovation and product-development initiative focused on the continuous rollout of new, differentiated financial products tailored for people looking to maximize freedom, security, and opportunity throughout their retirement.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of PHH's HECM servicing portfolio
catalysts.sentence: in November 2025 we announced that FAR and PHH Mortgage Corporation ( PHH ), a subsidiary of Onity Group Inc., entered into an agreement pursuant to which FAR will acquire PHH s HECM loan servicing portfolio and certain other reverse mortgage assets.

catalysts.event: Issuance of Series A Preferred Stock to Blue Owl
catalysts.sentence: on December 15, 2025, as part of our strategic partnership with funds affiliated with Blue Owl, we issued and sold 50,000 shares of Series A Convertible Perpetual Preferred Stock, par value $0.0001 per share (the Series A Preferred Stock ), at a price of $1,000 per share for an aggregate purchase price of $50.0 million.
On August 4, 2025 we issued an aggregate of $40.0 million of a new series of unsecured convertible promissory notes (the Convertible Notes ).

tamClaims.claim: Homeowners aged 62+ have $14.66 trillion in home equity as of Q3 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Based on quarterly estimates published by the National Reverse Mortgage Lenders Association in conjunction with RiskSpan, Inc., homeowners aged 62 and over have $14.66 trillion in home equity as of the third quarter of 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Only 2% of population aged 62+ uses reverse mortgage
tamClaims.sentence: only 2% of the population aged 62 and over utilizes a reverse mortgage loan according to a report published by Reverse Mortgage Insight from June 2022.

tamClaims.claim: Aggregate retirement savings shortfall of $4 trillion
tamClaims.sentence: the aggregate retirement savings shortfall estimated to be $4 trillion, according to a recent estimate from Athene.

tamClaims.claim: 11,400 people per day turning 65 from 2024 to 2026
tamClaims.sentence: Based on U.S. census data, from 2024 through 2026, 11,400 people per day in the U.S. have turned or will turn 65 years old.
